items.name: AvaTheAdorablePlushie
items.description:
AvaTheAdorablePlushie

This adorable little wolf, can now tag along side you on adventure, be it in a geometry obby that makes you dash and possibly rage repeatedly, a horror when you're under some pressure or even just by the pool. You can enjoy the comfort this little wolf brings :p

Disclaimer: This plushie has a tendancy to try and eat things. I am not responsible for any object, place, person or thing this plushie may attempt to eat.
